title: Tapping to Anchor Abundance Forever
subtitle: A tapping practice for closing the 84-day arc and embedding wealth as a permanent part of who you are, not something you maintain with effort
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 84 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the uncertainty that comes at the end of a structured programme, and moves toward a settled knowing that abundance is now identity, not practice.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 84 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the close of a structured money programme, or when you want to anchor what has shifted as permanent identity rather than temporary progress.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 84 of a 12-week money programme. Week 12 theme: live abundance as normal. Day 84 closes the 84-day arc and works with the question of what comes next, moving toward an answer that does not need another programme: abundance is now who you are.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though this 12-week journey ends today, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I know wealth will keep unfolding beyond these sessions, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though part of me wonders what's next, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: abundance is now part of who I am.
Side of eye: I live in wealth as naturally as breathing.
Under eye: I trust it to keep growing.
Under nose: I stay calm and grateful every day.
Chin: I create and receive with ease.
Collarbone: I love the life I've built.
Under arm: I carry these truths forward.
Top of head: I am abundance, now and always.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I embody permanent wealth and freedom.
Side of eye: I live as abundance in action.
Under eye: I trust money to flow for a lifetime.
Under nose: I feel rich in love, time, and resources.
Chin: I create, give, and enjoy without limit.
Collarbone: I am forever safe, free, and prosperous.
Under arm: I bless every future day with overflow.
Top of head: I anchor abundance as who I am, forever.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 84 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
